evidence_quotes.quote: prices, which are displayed to businesses and consumers according to the purchasing power determined by AI.

paragraphs.text: It is essential to better protect consumers, but also businesses, from manipulation. The rapid development of AI, through the easy combination of complex datasets, creates a tailor-made influence both in terms of purchasing decisions or behaviours and in terms of prices, which are displayed to businesses and consumers according to the purchasing power determined by AI. In particular, the area of unlimited deep learning should not be freely available to everyone, or at least the number of levels of freely available applications should be limited by law. In addition, the European Commission should carry out an impact assessment, which consumes unlimited access to AI, smart home, etc. in energy.
